generation.image_prompt: Traditional mystical illustration in the style of 1900s lithography, with clean bold black ink outlines. FULL BLEED: Image content (trees, rocks, sky) MUST touch all four physical edges of the 2:3 image. ABSOLUTELY NO WHITE MARGINS, NO VINTAGE PAPER BORDERS, NO MATTED EDGES. ABSOLUTELY NO TEXT, NO LABELS, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS IN THE ARTWORK. STRICTLY ANTHROPOMORPHIC. The subject is a Taiwan leopard cat standing upright on two legs with human-like posture and proportions. It MUST wear clothing or robes. Essential markers: white spots on back of black ears, white forehead stripes, and rosette leopard cat fur patterns. NO FOUR-LEGGED ANIMAL POSTURE. An anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat hanging upside down by one leg from a horizontal tree branch in a high forest canopy. He looks calm and contemplative, ignoring the world below. A faint halo of moonlight glows behind his head. Meaning: New perspective, the necessary waiting period in a fragmented habitat, and finding peace in suspension.
generation.narrative: An anthropomorphic Taiwan leopard cat hanging upside down by one leg from a horizontal tree branch in a high forest canopy. He looks calm and contemplative, ignoring the world below. A faint halo of moonlight glows behind his head. Meaning: New perspective, the necessary waiting period in a fragmented habitat, and finding peace in suspension.

meanings.upright: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives, and waiting for the right moment.
meanings.reversed: Stalling, needless sacrifice, fear of sacrifice, or feeling trapped without purpose.

ecology.risk_theme: waiting out human activity, adjusting to new rhythms
ecology.mapping_note: The Hanged Man represents the leopard cat's behavioral shift: waiting out the daylight and human activity by resting high in the trees, shifting its perspective to survive in a human-dominated landscape.

website.excerpt: Resting in the high canopy, The Hanged Man waits out the busy world, finding survival through a shift in perspective.
website.seo_description: The Hanged Man tarot card reimagined as a leopard cat resting and adapting to human activity rhythms.

meaning.zh: 暫停、臣服、放下、嶄新的視角，以及等待合適的時機。
meaning.en: Pause, surrender, letting go, new perspectives, and waiting for the right moment.
